verdict: Homepage batch: 7 principles with issues; top concerns: high be-discoverable: Low non-JS discoverability (0%); high be-inclusive: axe found 4 violation groups; medium be-sustainable: Heavy transfer on initial load (4.3 MB).
_caveats: Scale batch: no Lighthouse, LCP or INP in this pass; coordinator CDP data should fill objective metrics.
Memory is a single heap snapshot, not a repeated-interaction leak proof.
Dark-mode/reduced-motion are inferred from probes unless separately captured.
Memory principle pending rigorous same-session recheck; no pass/issue asserted from single/coarse heap snapshots.
Passive-only principles patched: trustworthy/resilient/natural-interactions/guided-navigation require active flow testing and are not counted as passes.

Lighthouse/trace/reduced-motion video were not collected in the original batch; future batches include them and this site needs supplemental evidence for high-confidence performance/reduced-motion claims.
